summary: Testing of mobile bug fixes reported by user Lysha. 6 of 6 features verified: (1) DNT button uses 'date' param and works correctly, (2) Adjust button opens Enter AP dialog, (3) complete-onboarding accepts trade_entries, (4) log-missed-trade accepts negative profits, (5) PreSyncWizard has mobile full-screen overlay, (6) PWA Install Instructions accessible from sidebar. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Works correctly with 'date' query param (not 'trade_date') - Bug #1 FIXED

ui_bugs.issue: LOT Size shows 'NaN' when Balance Before is shown - minor display issue

action_items: MINOR: Fix NaN display for LOT Size in Adjust Trade dialog (cosmetic issue)
Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components (console warnings)
critical_code_review_comments: Bug #1 (DNT button): VERIFIED FIXED - Frontend uses {date: date} param, backend expects 'date' query param
Bug #2 (Adjust button): VERIFIED FIXED - openAdjustTradeFromWizard uses setEnterAPDate and setEnterAPDialogOpen
Bug #3 (Onboarding balance): VERIFIED IN CODE - complete-onboarding creates trade_logs from trade_entries array (line 7047-7116)
Bug #4 (Missed Trade button): VERIFIED IN CODE - handleTradeEntry treats empty string as undefined (line 350)
Bug #5 (Negative profits): VERIFIED - log-missed-trade backend accepts negative actual_profit values
Bug #6 (Mobile overlay): VERIFIED - PreSyncWizard renders full-screen overlay when isMobile=true (data-testid='pre-sync-wizard-mobile')
Bug #7 (PWA Install): VERIFIED - Sidebar has 'Install App' menu item with PWAInstallInstructions dialog
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 95 verified 6 mobile bug fixes. Key endpoints tested: /api/trade/did-not-trade (uses 'date' query param), /api/trade/log-missed-trade (accepts negative actual_profit), /api/profit/complete-onboarding (accepts trade_entries array). Frontend: Balance Sync Wizard has mobile full-screen overlay, DNT and Adjust buttons work correctly, PWA Install Instructions accessible from sidebar profile dropdown. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_mobile_bug_fixes.py (11 tests).

verified_features.feature: Bug #1: DNT button in Balance Sync Wizard
verified_features.details: Uses 'date' query param correctly. Toast shows 'Marked 2026-02-06 as Did Not Trade'

verified_features.feature: Bug #2: Adjust button in Balance Sync Wizard
verified_features.details: Opens Enter AP dialog with balance before, lot size, target profit, and actual profit input
complete-onboarding endpoint iterates trade_entries and creates trade_logs (server.py line 7047-7116)
handleTradeEntry treats empty actualProfit as undefined, Clear button available (OnboardingWizardMobile.jsx)
log-missed-trade accepts negative values like -0.15, handleSubmitEnterAP no longer rejects negatives

verified_features.feature: Bug #6: Mobile full-screen overlay for Balance Sync Wizard
verified_features.details: PreSyncWizard renders full-screen overlay when isMobile=true with data-testid='pre-sync-wizard-mobile'
Sidebar has 'Install App' menu item (data-testid='install-app-menu-item'), PWAInstallInstructions shows device-specific instructions
